content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 Beta / test language WARN — SettingsView.swift:11 shows user-facing text "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" for the AI Sort toggle.

Pierre: Apple reviewers may flag user-visible "Experimental"/"unstable" language as signaling an unfinished feature, even though metadata and release notes are clean. Consider rewording to something like "AI Sort (beta feature)" only if truly intended, or better, remove "unstable/may lose sort order" phrasing and replace with clearer, confidence-inspiring copy or a proper in-app disclaimer that doesn't suggest data loss risk.
